channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cowboys beat Tampa Bay 26-24 as Baker Mayfield and the Bucs lose control of their playoff fate
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Baker Mayfield came home to Texas looking to keep his Tampa Bay Buccaneers on track for the playoffs. Instead, they'll need some help.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Penix wins debut as Atlanta QB as Falcons return two picks for TDs, beat hapless Giants 34-7
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Michael Penix Jr. felt a brief bit of apprehension as he ran down the tunnel, which was to be expected. Then he played like a veteran for the Atlanta Falcons.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rangers forward Matt Rempe suspended for eight games for elbow on Heiskanen
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — New York Rangers forward Matt Rempe was suspended for eight games by NHL’s Department of Player Safety on Sunday for boarding and elbowing Dallas Stars defenseman Miro Heiskanen on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: ALLAN KREDA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boise State's Jeanty is the best back in the nation. Penn State's duo could be right behind him
item.description: Boise State's Ashton Jeanty is the best running back in the country, with the stats and the hardware to prove it. Jeanty's ever-churning legs are the biggest — but not only — reasons why the Broncos stormed to a 12-1 record and the third seed in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn took all of 20 seconds to regain her former speed in comeback race at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — Maybe it was nerves for her first World Cup race back in nearly six years. Maybe it was a bumpier course than she's used to racing on. Maybe it was some wrong lines or angles.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz win back-to-back games for first time this season
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time since April, the Utah Jazz are on a winning streak. Lauri Markkanen scored 21 points, Collin Sexton and Svi Mykhailiuk each had 18 points, and the Utah Jazz beat the Brooklyn Nets 105-94 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: American competitive eater Joey Chestnut named Holiday Bowl Parade Grand Marshall
item.description: World-famous competitive eater Joey Chestnut has been chosen as the 2024 DIRECTV Holiday Bowl "Chief Eggnog Official." He will also serve as the Grand Marshal of the Holiday Bowl Parade.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Government funding deal opens door to move Washington Commanders stadium to DC
item.description: The Washington Commanders could soon be kicking off in the heart of the nation’s capital. The government funding deal unveiled by congressional negotiators Tuesday paved the way for moving the Commanders' stadium from Maryland to Washington, D.C.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Bears at Vikings preview: Injury updates, a look into recent matchups, and more
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS, Minn. (WGN) — The Chicago Bears travel to Minneapolis for Monday Night Football to face a surging Minnesota Vikings team that's won six straight and has a chance to tie the Detroit Lions for the NFC North lead in front of a national audience.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9
